descriptionText: If you are in the market for a dependable and well-equipped catamaran, this Bali 4.1 for sale 2019 could be the right option for you. Located in Sicily, Italy, this vessel has been cared for by only one owner since new and is in good condition. It offers a comfortable design, solid performance, and a range of equipment that makes it ideal for cruising, with enough space to comfortably accommodate up to 10 people.This particular model, manufactured in 2019, has a notable reliability track record and is currently registered, with a valid safety certificate until February 2027. Below, you can find full specifications and more details about the boat.Specifications Basic Details:Hull Length: 12.10 m CE Class: A (Ocean-going) Number of Owners: 1 Bringable Persons: 10 Location: Sicily, Italy Expiration of Safety Certificate: 13/02/2027 Deck and Hull:Hull Colour: White Hull Material: GRP Cushions: Partially replaced in April 2025 Bimini: Yes Additional Features: BBQ Interiors:Double Cabins: 4 Sailor's Cabin: 1 with WC Berths in Saloon: Yes, extra berth available Number of Toilets: 4 (electric) Cooking Facilities: Cooker with 3 burners Oven Fridge (+ freezer) Engines and Propulsion:Number of Engines: 2 Engine Type: Inboard diesel Brand: Yanmar Model: 3JH40 Transmission: S-drive Power: (details available on request per engine specifics) Propeller Type: 3 fixed blades Fuel Tank Capacity: 400 litres Steering System: Wheel Electronics & Instruments:Autopilot: Yes VHF Radio: Yes Compass: Yes Radar: Yes AIS Transponder: Raymarine Wind Station: Yes Plotter: Yes Stereo System: Installed Tridata & Log Instruments: Yes Electrical and Utility Installations:Battery Setup: 6 batteries total (4 service + 2 engine gel batteries, replaced April 2025) Total Ampere Output: 780 A Water Tank Capacity: 2 tanks totalling 800 litres Heating/Air Conditioning: Yes, air conditioning in all cabins Generator: Coelmo 7.5 kW Watermaker: Osmosea, 100 lt/h Solar Panels: 2 x 100W Additional Equipment: Battery charger, hot water system, black water pump, exterior shower Sails and Rigging:Mast Material: Aluminium Number of Winches: 2 (one electric, Harken brand) Lazy Bag: Yes Jib Furler: Yes Condition of Sails: Good Safety and Docking Equipment:Tender: Highfield, needs revision Outboard Engine: Selva, 9.9 hp Anchorwindlass: To be replaced Anchor: Included Chain Length: 70 m, to be replaced Life Raft: Included, valid until 03/2027 Docking Equipment: 8 + 2 ball fenders, mooring lines Overall, this Bali 4.1 has been maintained responsibly, although a few minor updates could enhance its overall usability such as replacing the anchor chain and windlass. Its well-appointed interiors, reliable Yanmar engines, and range of electrical setups ensure a comfortable and functional experience both at anchor and under sail. For those seeking a spacious and ready-to-cruise catamaran at a reasonable price, this Bali 4.1 for sale 2019 is worth considering.Don't hesitate to contact us or to book a viewing!
descriptionHtml:
If you are in the market for a dependable and well-equipped catamaran, this Bali 4.1 for sale 2019 could be the right option for you. Located in Sicily, Italy, this vessel has been cared for by only one owner since new and is in good condition. It offers a comfortable design, solid performance, and a range of equipment that makes it ideal for cruising, with enough space to comfortably accommodate up to 10 people.

This particular model, manufactured in 2019, has a notable reliability track record and is currently registered, with a valid safety certificate until February 2027. Below, you can find full specifications and more details about the boat.

Specifications Basic Details:

Hull Length: 12.10 m
CE Class: A (Ocean-going)
Number of Owners: 1
Bringable Persons: 10
Location: Sicily, Italy
Expiration of Safety Certificate: 13/02/2027
Deck and Hull:

Hull Colour: White
Hull Material: GRP
Cushions: Partially replaced in April 2025
Bimini: Yes
Additional Features: BBQ
Interiors:

Double Cabins: 4
Sailor's Cabin: 1 with WC
Berths in Saloon: Yes, extra berth available
Number of Toilets: 4 (electric)
Cooking Facilities:
Cooker with 3 burners
Oven
Fridge (+ freezer)
Engines and Propulsion:

Number of Engines: 2
Engine Type: Inboard diesel
Brand: Yanmar
Model: 3JH40
Transmission: S-drive
Power: (details available on request per engine specifics)
Propeller Type: 3 fixed blades
Fuel Tank Capacity: 400 litres
Steering System: Wheel
Electronics & Instruments:

Autopilot: Yes
VHF Radio: Yes
Compass: Yes
Radar: Yes
AIS Transponder: Raymarine
Wind Station: Yes
Plotter: Yes
Stereo System: Installed
Tridata & Log Instruments: Yes
Electrical and Utility Installations:

Battery Setup: 6 batteries total (4 service + 2 engine gel batteries, replaced April 2025)
Total Ampere Output: 780 A
Water Tank Capacity: 2 tanks totalling 800 litres
Heating/Air Conditioning: Yes, air conditioning in all cabins
Generator: Coelmo 7.5 kW
Watermaker: Osmosea, 100 lt/h
Solar Panels: 2 x 100W
Additional Equipment: Battery charger, hot water system, black water pump, exterior shower
Sails and Rigging:

Mast Material: Aluminium
Number of Winches: 2 (one electric, Harken brand)
Lazy Bag: Yes
Jib Furler: Yes
Condition of Sails: Good
Safety and Docking Equipment:

Tender: Highfield, needs revision
Outboard Engine: Selva, 9.9 hp
Anchorwindlass: To be replaced
Anchor: Included
Chain Length: 70 m, to be replaced
Life Raft: Included, valid until 03/2027
Docking Equipment: 8 + 2 ball fenders, mooring lines
Overall, this Bali 4.1 has been maintained responsibly, although a few minor updates could enhance its overall usability such as replacing the anchor chain and windlass. Its well-appointed interiors, reliable Yanmar engines, and range of electrical setups ensure a comfortable and functional experience both at anchor and under sail. For those seeking a spacious and ready-to-cruise catamaran at a reasonable price, this Bali 4.1 for sale 2019 is worth considering.

Don't hesitate to contact us or to book a viewing!
